title: 金鯱賞の後に・動けない、動かない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I somehow manage to finish the Kinko Sho. Some
of my fans call out to me after the race, but how
can I face them in this state?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I stand there paralyzed, Sweep butts in and
demands that I act more like myself... But if I do
that, I won't be like a proper princess, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing my hesitation, Trainer asks me to think
about my ideal self once again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My convictions are still wavering, but one thing's
for sure—I can't enter the Victoria Mile like this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My idol, King, is running in the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen, which is being held at the same time as a
Princess Fighter show. Maybe if I enter too,
something will change...
